name: components/accordion
description: A vertically stacked set of interactive headings that each reveal a section of content. Supports single and multiple expanded panels, built on Kobalte Accordion with smooth expand/collapse animations (accordion-up/accordion-down), full keyboard navigation, and ARIA accessibility. Composed of Accordion, AccordionItem, AccordionTrigger, and AccordionContent primitives.
useCases: FAQ pages to collapse common questions and answers, reducing vertical scroll length
Settings panels to group configuration options by category and keep the interface clean
Product detail pages to fold secondary information such as specifications and return policies
Multi-step form result summaries to show or hide details of each completed step
usage: import { Accordion, AccordionItem, AccordionTrigger, AccordionContent } from "shadcn-solid-components/components/accordion"
